recommendations.title: DC Showcase: Catwoman
recommendations.overview: Catwoman attempts to track down a mysterious cargo shipment that is linked to a Gotham City crime boss called Rough Cut.

recommendations.title: The Craft: Legacy
recommendations.overview: An eclectic foursome of aspiring teenage witches get more than they bargained for as they lean into their newfound powers.

recommendations.title: Band Aid
recommendations.overview: A couple who can't stop fighting embark on a last-ditch effort to save their marriage: turning their fights into songs and starting a band.

recommendations.title: Memphis Belle

recommendations.title: Kid's Story
recommendations.overview: A high school student is haunted by thoughts of "The Matrix" and a person named "Neo".

recommendations.title: The Transformers: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Family
recommendations.overview: The Autobots must stop a colossal planet-consuming robot who goes after the Autobot Matrix of Leadership. At the same time, they must defend themselves against an all-out attack from the Decepticons.

recommendations.director: Koji Morimoto, Takeshi Koike, Shinichiro Watanabe, Andrew R. Jones, Yoshiaki Kawajiri, Mahiro Maeda, Peter Chung

recommendations.title: Program
recommendations.overview: Cis and Duo discuss leaving the real world while during a samurai sword fight. Part of the Animatrix collection of animated shorts set in the Matrix universe.
